name: KAANAPALI LAND LLC
summary: Kaanapali Land LLC is a Hawaii-based land company with subsidiaries engaged in land management, farming services, coffee distribution, and real estate development across Hawaii and mainland US. Its subsidiaries include Kaanapali Land Management Corporation, Kaanapali Farm Services, MauiGrown Coffee Distributors, Pioneer Mill Company, and several land development entities organized in Hawaii and Delaware.
